title: Avoid Trailing Comments
description: Trailing comments can make code less readable. They should be placed on the previous empty line of code.
recommendation: Move comments to the previous empty line

noncompliant: int a1 = b + c; // This is a trailing comment
compliant:
// This comment is properly placed before the line of code
int a2 = b + c;

checks.message: Move comments to the previous empty line
